episode_name: Tan Son Nhut / DAO rocket strike
geographic_scope: Defense Attaché Office compound and Tan Son Nhut perimeter, Saigon
theater_description: Rocket strike at the DAO/Tan Son Nhut complex immediately before helicopter-only evacuation became final.
geometry_method_note: Bounded to the DAO compound and immediate Tan Son Nhut strike area.
military_area_note: Episode captures only the direct strike that killed the last two U.S. ground casualties.
civilian_area_note: Evacuee populations are not used as a denominator for this strike episode because the risk pool is mixed and the strike site is narrowly military-adjacent.
split_reason: Kept separate from the helicopter evacuation because the strike has a clean death numerator while the evacuation provides the better exposure count.
quality_note: Very strong direct military death numerator; denominator remains weak.

geographic_scope: DAO compound and U.S. Embassy helicopter evacuation nodes, Saigon
theater_description: Final helicopter evacuation from DAO and embassy compounds during the urban collapse.
geometry_method_note: Bounded to the helicopter evacuation nodes, not to all of Saigon.
military_area_note: American evacuee totals are not assigned by status because the open count mixes civilians and personnel.
civilian_area_note: Vietnamese and third-country nationals evacuated by helicopter are treated as the cleanest civilian exposure count.
split_reason: Separated from the rocket-strike row because it supplies the clearest bounded exposure denominator, even though it has no robust civilian death numerator.
quality_note: Useful exposure anchor but still not a full DR episode.
